evidence: Live zh Big Five result page showed the result recovery banner eyebrow `结果找回` and helper text `这不会阻塞当前免费结果预览。保存后，我们会把访问链接发送到你的邮箱，方便换设备或稍后继续查看。`; local search maps this to app/(localized)/[locale]/(app)/result/[id]/ResultClient.tsx.
why_not_current_pr_scope: PR14 scope is limited to Big Five renderer files and contracts. Changing the generic result client recovery banner would affect non-Big-Five result pages and requires a separate result-shell UX scope.
recommended_follow_up: Open a scoped fap-web PR for result recovery banner UX, with assertions covering Big Five and non-Big-Five result pages.
